message:
bd-bpw: complete eager loading hydration with tracing

Add Row helper methods for extracting aliased columns:
- subset_by_prefix() - extract columns with table__column format
- has_prefix() - check if columns exist for a prefix
- prefix_is_all_null() - detect LEFT JOIN null results

Update all_eager() for proper result hydration:
- Parse parent models from aliased columns via subset_by_prefix()
- Deduplicate results by primary key (handles one-to-many JOINs)
- Add comprehensive tracing instrumentation at debug/trace levels

Full Related<T>/RelatedMany<T> population requires macro support and
is tracked separately in bd-3hy. The JOIN query still avoids N+1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,3 +13,4 @@ workspace = true
 sqlmodel-core.workspace = true
 asupersync.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
